---
pagetitle: "News | Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-hero}
# News

Research updates, presentations, outreach events, fieldwork notes, website releases, and professional milestones.
:::

::: {.section-block}

## News pathways

::: {.gateway-grid}

::: {.gateway-card}
### Research updates

Manuscript progress, analysis milestones, project development, and new outputs.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Field notes

Sampling updates, environmental observations, and project fieldwork stories.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Outreach

Community events, WildCiencia updates, teaching materials, and public communication.
:::

::: {.gateway-card}
### Website ecosystem

New repositories, project websites, resource pages, and future platform updates.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section-block}

## 2026

::: {.news-grid}

::: {.news-card}
### Personal academic portal launched

This website was created as a central academic portal for my research, teaching, outreach, CV, publications, presentations, and project-specific websites.

**Category:** Website update
:::

::: {.news-card}
### Human *Toxoplasma gondii* epidemiology manuscript in preparation

The human *Toxoplasma gondii* epidemiology project is being developed into a manuscript using diagnostic testing records from Puerto Rico.

**Category:** Research update
:::

::: {.news-card}
### Manatee Project Puerto Rico continues development

The Manatee Project Puerto Rico continues as a research program focused on environmental transmission pathways of *Toxoplasma gondii* and potential conservation implications for the endangered Caribbean manatee.

**Category:** Thesis research
:::

:::
:::
